title: Droid (disambiguation)
content:
'''Droid''' or '''droids''' could mean several things:

*Actual '''[[Droid/Legends|droids]]'''.
*'''''[[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO]]''''', an animated series.
*'''''[[Star Wars: Droids (1986)|Star Wars: Droids]]''''', a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] series by [[Marvel Comics]].
*'''''[[Star Wars: Droids (1994)|Star Wars: Droids]]''''', a comic series by [[Dark Horse Comics]].
*'''''[[Star Wars: Droids (toy line)|''Star Wars: Droids'']]''''', a toy line based on the animated series.
*'''''[[Star Wars: Droids (video game)|''Star Wars: Droids'']]''''', a video game based on the animated series.

==See also==
*[[Defense Droid (disambiguation)]]
